segments.text: you will never hit rock bottom again after this if you tend to overthink about your future a lot use your ability to look out into the future to your
advantage for example if you're worried about a job interview this is the interview that will decide your future with your career when you find that you're stressing yourself out about this
for a second picture yourself 5 years from now think about how you gave this interview there were a few challenges but you overcame them and you ended up
doing really well you also realized that this was not the only interview you did you gave 10 other interviews in order to land a job and you're doing well in life
this strategy is called temporal distancing it's an emotional regulation strategy where you zoom out and you distance yourself from the situation
you're overthinking about the future a lot because you're too close to the situation in this moment what this strategy does is reduces the immediacy
and the urgency of the situation and helps you calm down and take better decisions think about it
